input.background: A parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability. The system reliability is calculated using the formula $$R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999$$.
input.question: What is the failure time distribution function of the system?

output.answer: The failure time distribution function of the system is $$F(t)=P\left(T_P \leq t\right)=\prod_{i=1}^{n} F_i(t)$$.
